scripts.test: node --test scripts/_lib.test.mjs scripts/micropub.test.mjs && node --import tsx/esm --test src/lib/content.test.ts src/lib/site-config.test.ts src/lib/markdown.test.ts src/lib/render.test.ts src/lib/footnotes.test.ts src/lib/footnote-nav.test.ts src/lib/md-output.test.ts src/lib/json-output.test.ts
scripts.test:lib: node --import tsx/esm --test src/lib/content.test.ts src/lib/site-config.test.ts src/lib/markdown.test.ts src/lib/render.test.ts src/lib/footnotes.test.ts src/lib/footnote-nav.test.ts src/lib/md-output.test.ts src/lib/json-output.test.ts
scripts.test:zig: cd scripts/micropub-server && zig build test --summary all
